summary: Phase 0 recon complete: 1 of 8 sources verified live (duval_official_records), 3 blocked on credential rotation, 3 stubbed, 1 PRR-gated.
operator_actions_required_before_stage_b: Rotate hardcoded password used in duval_court_records, duval_tax_deed_sales, duval_foreclosure_sales_scrappey scrapers and add the new credentials as GitHub repo secrets.
Rotate Browserless token and add as GitHub repo secret.
Provide SCRAPPEY_API_KEY as a GitHub repo secret (or decide to retire the Scrappey path).
Approve Stage B PR scope (official_records thin slice + dashboard 24h default chip).
notes: Operator flips status to 'accepted', sets signoff_by + signoff_at, and commits the change. Stage B PR may not be opened before this gate is accepted on main.
